title: Bridge Essay: Subjective signal strength distinguishes reality from imagination.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Phase Imaginal bridge-v3 targeted acquisition.

**Subjective signal strength distinguishes reality from imagination.** — Nature communications (2023). PMID: 36959279. DOI: 10.1038/s41467-023-37322-1. Score: 43. Humans are voracious imaginers, with internal simulations supporting memory, planning and decision-making. Because the neural mechanisms supporting imagery overlap with those supporting perception, afoundational question is how reality and imagination are kept apart. One possibility is that the intention to imagine is used to identify and discount self-generated signals during imagery.
